programme.desc: Beidh Paddy Ó Briain as Cathair Chorcaí ag foghlaim faoina shloinne sa gclár seo. (Paddy O'Brien goes in search of the history of the O'Brien surname.)

programme.title: Seal le Dáithí
programme.desc: Is í Aoife Dowd a bheith ag caitheamh seal le Dáithí ar an gclár. Is ealaíontóir as Conamara í Aoife. (Dáithí will be chatting with Conamara-based painter Aoife Dowd on the show.)

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Baineann madra plaic as Cliff agus socraíonn sé an dlí a chur ar an té ar leis é. (Cliff is bitten by a dog and plans to sue the owner.)

programme.title: Opry le Daniel ar Turas
programme.desc: As an Amharclann Ríoga i bPort Láirge a chuirfidh Daniel an tsraith i láthair. (Presented from the Theatre Royal in Waterford.)

programme.title: Carmen Curlers
programme.desc: Tá intinn Axel dírithe go hiomlán ar a smaoineamh faoi chatóir. (Axel cannot let go of the idea of the curler.)

programme.title: An Aimsir Láithreach
programme.desc: Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)

programme.title: Fíorscéal
programme.desc: Tugann an clár faisnéis léargas ar an mborradh as cuimse a tháinig ar TikTok. (This documentary reveals what lies behind TikTok's extraordinary rise.)

programme.title: Hacks
programme.desc: Déanann Ava iarracht rún a choinneáil ó Deborah, ach scaoileann dlúthchara Deborah an rún. (Ava tries to keep a secret from Deborah, but someone in Deborah's inner-circle leverages the truth.)
